title: Food Processing & Grocery Price Analysis
description: Analyzed grocery product data across stores to study relationships between food processing scores (FPro), pricing, and nutrition metrics using Python visualization and regression analysis.

title: Manhattan Hourly Density Visualization
description: Created a temporal density visualization showing activity patterns across Manhattan by hour using spatial aggregation and geographic plotting.

title: K-Means Clustering & PCA Exploration
description: Applied principal component analysis and clustering methods to examine structure in multivariate datasets and visualize dimensionality reduction.

title: Natural Resource Utilization & Fuel Price Trends
description: Explored relationships between oil, gas, and mineral rents and fuel prices using scatterplots, best-fit lines, and transformed scales.

title: Portfolio Website Development
description: Built a responsive portfolio website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with reusable navigation, JSON-driven content, and dark mode support.

title: GitHub API Integration Dashboard
description: Fetched and displayed live GitHub profile statistics using asynchronous JavaScript and a public API endpoint.

title: Convolution Filters & Image Processing Demo
description: Implemented convolution filters and pooling concepts to understand feature extraction in image processing and neural networks.

title: Spline Interpolation & Curve Approximation
description: Explored cubic spline interpolation methods to model smooth transitions between data points and compare approximation quality.

title: Optimization Algorithms in Linear Programming
description: Worked through simplex-style optimization methods, feasible directions, and duality concepts for constrained linear problems.

title: Corruption & Institutional Economics Research Review
description: Synthesized research papers on corruption, incentives, and public accountability to evaluate institutional economic behavior.

title: Population Growth & Malthusian Theory Analysis
description: Studied historical population theory and compared Malthusian predictions with later economic and demographic transitions.

title: Sequence Convergence & Numerical Methods
description: Analyzed convergence behavior of iterative numerical sequences, including error order, asymptotics, and approximation techniques from upper-division applied mathematics.
